en: You received this form because you connected to a client site in Morocco.
Avetta PQF - Morocco Company Information
Morocco

Limited Liability Company (SARL) A SARL is a private limited liability company, widely used by small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs) in Morocco. Public Limited Company (SA) A SA is a public limited company suitable for large enterprises and those seeking to raise capital from the public. Simplified Joint-Stock Company (SAS) The SAS is a flexible corporate structure introduced to provide more adaptable and innovative governance options. Sole Proprietorship A sole proprietorship indicates that a business is owned and operated by a single individual. Branch Office A branch office is registered in the Commercial Register but is not a separate legal entity from its foreign parent company. Liaison Office (Representative Office) A liaison office allows foreign companies to officially represent themselves in Morocco without creating a separate Moroccan legal entity.
Please indicate your company's business entity / form of business within Morocco.

The assigned NMA2010 code appears on official business registration documents, including trade register certificates, tax identification records (IF), and business licenses. Find more information on the Haut Commissariat au Plan (HCP) website.

An ICE number is a unique 15-digit number assigned to every company operating in Morocco. It serves as the company’s universal identifier for all administrative, fiscal, and legal activities. You can find your ICE on the official government portal for ICE.
